audit_items.proof_trace: The `goto cleanup` label at L642 is positioned after `if (reply != c->buf) sdsfree(reply)` at L639, so all early error exits skip the free and never access uninitialized `reply`. robj argv elements are either cached in `cached_objects[]` or decrRef'd at cleanup and not accessed thereafter. The one identified bug (ldbEval L2244-2245: `expr` not freed when both luaL_loadbuffer calls fail) is a memory leak, not a UAF, as `expr` is never dereferenced after sdsfree(code) returns.
